title: EvaluationRequest
description: EvaluationRequest schema from Amplitude Experiment Evaluation API

user_id.description: The user ID to evaluate experiments and flags for.

device_id.description: The device ID to evaluate experiments and flags for.

user_properties.description: User properties to use for targeting rule evaluation.

groups.description: Group type to group name mappings for group-level targeting.

group_properties.description: Group properties to use for targeting rule evaluation.
